name: OMMS-PRO Memory System
description: OMMS-PRO memory system integration for Claude Code - enables cross-session memory recall and capture
author: OMMS Team

configFields.description: Agent identifier for this Claude instance
Enable Claude hooks for automatic memory operations

hooks.name: init-session
hooks.description: Initialize session and output L0/L1 user context

hooks.name: recall-memory
hooks.description: Recall relevant memories before generating response

hooks.name: capture-session
hooks.description: Final memory capture at session end

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: Recall relevant memories from OMMS-PRO memory system based on semantic similarity

tools.name: memory_capture
tools.description: Capture the current conversation as a memory in OMMS-PRO

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List all memories in the OMMS-PRO system with optional filtering

tools.name: profile_get
tools.description: Get the user profile including L0 identity and L1 preferences

tools.name: omms_record_context
tools.description: Record user/assistant conversation to local JSONL file (MANDATORY after each response)

tools.name: omms_capture_session
tools.description: Capture full conversation memory at session end
